keyTakeaways.text: IoT & XR: Qualcomm Incorporated today announced that it has reached an agreement to acquire Modular Inc, strengthening Qualcomm Technologies, Inc.’s software foundation for generative and agentic AI across data

articles.title: Qualcomm to Acquire Modular
articles.description: Qualcomm Incorporated today announced that it has reached an agreement to acquire Modular Inc, strengthening Qualcomm Technologies, Inc.’s software foundation for generative and agentic AI across data center and edge environments. The post Qualcomm to Acquire Modular appeared first on Semiconductor Digest.
articles.summary: Qualcomm Incorporated today announced that it has reached an agreement to acquire Modular Inc, strengthening Qualcomm Technologies, Inc.’s software foundation for generative and agentic AI across data center and edge environments. The post Qualcomm to Acquire Modular appeared first on Semiconductor Digest.
